requirements: Define an explicit TTL for every cache entry; no 'forever' caches without invalidation.
Document the exact invalidation event for each cached value.
Prefer a single source of truth: read-through or write-through, not both ad hoc.
Namespace cache keys per environment/tenant; never collide across deployments.
Make the system correct without the cache; treat the cache as a performance hint.
security: never cache responses that vary by authorization without a per-user key
do not cache PII or secrets in shared infrastructure caches
performance: measure hit rate before and after the change
avoid stampedes (use single-flight, jitter, or staggered TTL)
verify: unit test cache miss, hit, and invalidation paths
run lint and tests on the changed files
